title: limonium recurvum subsp. humile
intro: Limonium recurvum subsp. humile, also known as dwarf sea lavender, is a low-growing, shrubby perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Limonium recurvum subsp. humile can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
